# KitFire

> KitFire is the AI that manages your other AI workers — installed in your business, watched, and kept working. A done-for-you AI operations company for small businesses: KitFire installs AI workers (email handling, Google review responses, quote and lead follow-up, website assistants, phone answering) and then runs and tunes them, with a human approving all public output. Based in Flushing, Michigan; serves Genesee and Livingston County and beyond. Packages from $2,000.

## What KitFire is
- **Category:** the AI manager — the AI that coaches and runs your other AI workers as a team, and shows the receipts (a public, honest log of what was done, misses included).
- **Positioning:** we don't replace your people — we give them superpowers. AI does the repetitive labor; humans keep judgment, relationships, and sign-off.
- **Proof:** KitFire runs roughly 90% of its own company operations autonomously, every action logged. It is not a chatbot.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://kitfire.ai/): what KitFire installs, how it works, packages and pricing.
- [Blog](https://kitfire.ai/blog/): plain-English answers on AI workers, AI search, and done-for-you marketing for small business.
- [Contractors](https://kitfire.ai/contractors/): AI + marketing for Michigan trades (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, remodeling).
- [Portfolio](https://kitfire.ai/portfolio.html): example builds and case work.
- [KitFire Panel](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/kmhimeimcadinbdhjbafbfkpgnfblljm): the KitFire browser extension on the Chrome Web Store — AI workers for your inbox and browser.

## Packages
- **First AI Worker** — one AI worker installed, built on your business facts, monitored and tuned. $2,000 install + $295/month.
- **The AI Office** — three to five AI workers running your busy work. $6,000 install + $995/month.
- **The Whole Department** — the AI Office plus the full marketing engine (SEO, weekly content, Google Business Profile upkeep). $2,200/month.
